answer.text:
Hi, Boris and Siti,

 

The same error occurred when we tried to do the “confirm”, we assumed it might cause by the closed vessel/CUQD2422E, which ATD at POL on 2024.10.16.  Anyway, let us check and find out a solution.

Thanks & Best Regards!

Catherine KANG/康秀英
Business Analysis Manager
Digital & IT Department
E-mail: catherinekang@culines.com <mail
Web: www.culines.com <http://www.culines.com/>
